pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin version to support Java 11 compilation features.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older plugin versions may not correctly handle Java 11 module system or newer language features, potentially causing compilation failures or warnings.

pom.xml.general_idea: Switch from separate source/target configuration to the unified release flag for Java 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'release' flag is the standard way to compile for Java 11+ and ensures API compatibility with the target version; using source/target 1.8 would compile for Java 8, not 11.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove obsolete compilerVersion configuration as it is no longer needed with the release flag.
